name: efundo
description: eFundo — learning platform for exam papers, notes, lessons, and practice tests

scripts.dev: bash scripts/check-db.sh && concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @efundo/api" "npm run dev -w @efundo/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @efundo/shared-types && npm run build -w @efundo/api && npm run build -w @efundo/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @efundo/api && npm run lint -w @efundo/web
